headline: Risk-on holds into close — QQQ +2.4%, VXX subdued; VRT added full-size alongside MRVL & FULC

market_state.line: SPY +1.03% above 50d, QQQ +2.4%, VXX stress ratio 0.93 — tape is clean; entries have tailwind but chasing risk is real near HOD.

actions.line: Quarter size on pullback — signal flags chasing; research+risk green.
Full size — all three desks agree; RSI 57, fresh MACD cross, textbook risk-on setup.
Half size — low RSI entry, fresh MACD cross; research neutral but signal+risk green.

watch.line: +16.6% on 2.31× volume — unusual volume + big move, no catalyst tagged; watch for follow-through or fade.
+19.7% biggest 1d move in scan; rel volume only 1× suggests technical, not news-driven — fragile.
-13.7% on 2.4× volume — heaviest unusual-volume loser; potential short setup if bounce is sold.
+13.6% on 1.83× vol — semis/materials name ripping with market; watch for desk upgrade to take.
+13.3% on 1.65× vol — consumer discretionary leadership in risk-on tape; no desk take yet.

changed: VRT added as full-size long — new desk take not in previous briefing.
Desk now has three active takes (MRVL, VRT, FULC) vs two prior.
caveats: RTH scan as of 14:58 ET — prices are ~2 mins from close; fills on all three takes depend on EOD and next-open action.
No catalysts or macro events flagged this scan — moves in FCEL, QS, TNGX are unattributed; thin catalyst context raises gap-risk overnight.
